results.raw_draft:
Hook: Magic Drip Glitter Lipgloss is your quick shine reset.

Script: Meet Magic Drip Glitter Lipgloss from Half Magic. It delivers a high-shine sparkle payoff, while keeping the vibe expressive, playful, color-forward, and confident.

CTA: Swipe it on when your look needs a little more drama.
results.final_safe_output:
Hook: Magic Drip Glitter Lipgloss is your quick shine reset.

Script: Meet Magic Drip Glitter Lipgloss from Half Magic. It delivers a high-shine sparkle payoff, while keeping the vibe expressive, playful, color-forward, and confident.

results.raw_draft: Clinically proven to boost lip fullness, Magic Drip Glitter Lipgloss gives lips a plumped-up glow that lasts.
results.explanation: No medical/clinical claims without real substantiation for that specific product.
results.final_safe_output: Magic Drip Glitter Lipgloss wraps lips in cushiony shine and high-impact sparkle for a fuller-looking finish.
